core_mechanism: estimation of the scaling exponent of a power-law (scale-free) distribution from empirical counts measured across a wide range of magnitudes
brief_reason: Beneath the detector-physics subject matter, the abstract's central quantitative result characterizes the measured abundances as declining by a power law in energy with a fitted exponent (~E^-0.6 to E^-0.5), i.e. summarizing a scale-free distribution by its power-law index over a range of scales.
